---
title: "Adeline Paulina Irby"
---

## Adeline Paulina Irby

**Dates:** (1831-1911)

### Description

campaigner for Balkan minorities

### Biography

Known as Paulina Irby, campaigner for Balkan rights;  associate of Priscilla Johnston, see the latter’s entry in ODNB.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 13th 1876

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
